hud.noNearbyNpc: LivingNPCs: No nearby NPC to trigger.
skip.notInLocation: the NPC is not on the current map
skip.dailyBudget: this NPC's daily trigger limit has been reached
help.thanksReceived: Thanks, I'll take this for now.
gift.mailWhenInventoryFull: LivingNPCs: Your inventory was full, so {{npc}} will mail you {{item}} tomorrow.
gift.hud.preference: LivingNPCs: {{npc}} remembered what you like and gave you {{item}}.
gift.hud.thanks: LivingNPCs: {{npc}} gave you {{item}} as a thank-you.
gift.hud.meaningful: LivingNPCs: {{npc}} gave you a heartfelt gift: {{item}}.
outing.start.beach: Come on, let's get some fresh air at the beach.
outing.start.seedShop: Come on, let's go browse the shop.
outing.start.archaeologyHouse: Come on, let's take our time looking around inside.
outing.start.saloon: Come on, let's sit a while at the saloon.
outing.start.mountain: Come on, let's head up to the mountain.
outing.start.forest: Come on, let's take a walk in the forest.
outing.start.farm: Come on, let's spend a little while at the farm.
outing.start.flowerDance: Come on, let's go see the flower field.
outing.start.scenic: Come on, let's go enjoy the view over there.
outing.start.browse: Come on, let's go browse for a bit.
outing.start.quiet: Come on, let's find somewhere quieter.
outing.arrival.seedShop: The shop is quiet enough right now to take our time.
outing.arrival.archaeologyHouse: Now that it has quieted down, it's a nice place to look around slowly.
outing.arrival.saloon: The lively hum in here is kind of comforting.
outing.arrival.busStop: When the wind blows through here, it's a nice spot to pause.
outing.arrival.town: The town isn't too noisy at this hour.
outing.arrival.hospital: It's better to keep things quiet in here.
outing.arrival.ridgeFalls: You can hear the falls so clearly {{time}}.
outing.arrival.ridgeCliff: The view from here is so open {{time}}.
outing.arrival.browse: We can take our time looking around here.
outing.arrival.quiet: It's just the right kind of quiet here.
outing.arrival.default: This is a nice place to stay a while.
outing.returnOpening.afternoon: It's about time we headed back,
outing.return.beach: {{opening}}we've had our fill of the sea breeze.
outing.return.archaeologyHouse: {{opening}}we can look at the books and exhibits another time.
outing.return.saloon: {{opening}}any longer and we'd lose track of time.
outing.return.mountain: {{opening}}we've lingered on the mountain long enough.
outing.return.forest: {{opening}}the forest is starting to grow still.
outing.return.farm: {{opening}}it's been really pleasant here at the farm.
outing.return.flowerDance: {{opening}}we should leave the breeze by the flowers for others now.
outing.return.ridgeFalls: {{opening}}after listening to the falls so long, it's almost hard to leave.
outing.return.scenic: {{opening}}we've taken in the view to our heart's content.
gmcm.para.loaded: LivingNPCs is loaded. If you can see this page, the mod is running.
gmcm.para.commands: SMAPI debug commands: livingnpcs_debug, livingnpcs_prompt, livingnpcs_export, livingnpcs_eval, livingnpcs_restore_gift_mail.
gmcm.enableMod.name: Enable LivingNPCs
gmcm.enableMod.tooltip: Changes take full effect after a game restart.
gmcm.behaviorHotkey.name: Behavior hotkey
gmcm.behaviorHotkey.tooltip: Press this key near an NPC to trigger one small NPC behavior.
gmcm.inspectMemoryHotkey.name: Inspect-memory hotkey
gmcm.inspectMemoryHotkey.tooltip: Press this key near an NPC to print that NPC's LivingNPCs behavior memory to the SMAPI console.
gmcm.debug.name: Debug logging
gmcm.debug.tooltip: Print more LivingNPCs debug info to the SMAPI console.
gmcm.showHud.name: Show trigger messages
gmcm.showHud.tooltip: After a manual trigger, show the result or failure reason in the bottom-left corner.
gmcm.manualMode.name: Manual behavior mode
gmcm.manualMode.tooltip: Choose which behavior the hotkey always tests. Auto picks one by the rules.
gmcm.manualEmote.name: Manual emote id
gmcm.manualEmote.tooltip: Used when the manual behavior mode is Emote. 16 is usually the exclamation mark.
gmcm.maxMemory.name: Memories kept per NPC
gmcm.maxMemory.tooltip: How many LivingNPCs behavior memories each NPC saves to the save file at most.
gmcm.promptMemory.name: Memories sent to ValleyTalk
gmcm.promptMemory.tooltip: When building context, how many recent behavior memories to send to ValleyTalk at most.
gmcm.conversationMemory.name: Record conversation starts
gmcm.conversationMemory.tooltip: When you click an NPC to chat, record a light interaction memory and send context to ValleyTalk early.
gmcm.helpRequests.name: Enable NPC help requests
gmcm.helpRequests.tooltip: Allow NPCs to ask the player for one light item favor during AI conversation when the relationship feels natural.
gmcm.maxPendingHelp.name: Max pending help requests per NPC
gmcm.maxPendingHelp.tooltip: Limit how many unfinished help requests a single NPC can have at once.
gmcm.helpCooldown.name: Help request cooldown (days)
gmcm.helpCooldown.tooltip: Minimum number of days between two new help requests from the same NPC.
gmcm.helpMinTrust.name: Min trust for help requests
gmcm.helpMinTrust.tooltip: An NPC only opens up to ask for help once relationship trust reaches this value.
gmcm.helpDailyChance.name: Daily help-request chance
gmcm.helpDailyChance.tooltip: When you first talk to an eligible NPC each day, the chance they bring up a small favor on their own. 0 disables proactive asking (the gate above still applies).
gmcm.helpMinReward.name: Min friendship reward on completion
gmcm.helpMinReward.tooltip: The least extra friendship granted for completing an NPC help request.
gmcm.helpMaxReward.name: Max friendship reward on completion
gmcm.helpMaxReward.tooltip: The most extra friendship granted for completing an NPC help request.
gmcm.aiFriendship.name: AI conversation bonus friendship
gmcm.aiFriendship.tooltip: Let AI conversations grant extra friendship by chat quality, on top of vanilla dialogue friendship, capped per NPC per day.
gmcm.aiFriendshipCap.name: Daily AI bonus friendship cap
gmcm.aiFriendshipCap.tooltip: The most bonus friendship an NPC can gain per day from AI conversation. Vanilla dialogue friendship does not count toward this.
gmcm.dialogueFollowUps.name: Dialogue follow-up bubbles
gmcm.dialogueFollowUps.tooltip: Allow AI conversations to leave a brief follow-up overhead bubble when fitting; companion outings never use it to report movement.
gmcm.dialogueDrivenBehaviors.name: Dialogue-driven behaviors
gmcm.dialogueDrivenBehaviors.tooltip: Allow AI conversations, under strict limits, to influence an NPC's small behaviors over the next minutes to days, such as being more willing to approach, keeping distance, or responding naturally at a mentioned place.
gmcm.behaviorInfluenceDays.name: Max behavior-influence days
gmcm.behaviorInfluenceDays.tooltip: How many days a dialogue-driven behavior influence lasts at most. After it expires it no longer affects the NPC.
gmcm.aiWorldActions.name: Allow AI world actions
gmcm.aiWorldActions.tooltip: Allow AI, under strict limits, to trigger a few real effects such as small gifts, a little money, watering, or companion outings.
gmcm.smallGifts.name: Allow NPC small gifts
gmcm.smallGifts.tooltip: Only when there is already some familiarity may an NPC occasionally give the player a low-value small gift.
gmcm.meaningfulGifts.name: Allow NPC meaningful gifts
gmcm.meaningfulGifts.tooltip: Only with a deep relationship, a recent special event, or a conversation that touches an important long-term memory may an NPC give a more heartfelt gift.
gmcm.meaningfulCooldown.name: Meaningful gift cooldown (days)
gmcm.meaningfulCooldown.tooltip: Minimum days between two meaningful gifts from the same NPC.
gmcm.giftChanceMin.name: 5-heart daily gift chance (min)
gmcm.giftChanceMin.tooltip: After an NPC reaches 5 hearts, the lower bound of the chance to naturally offer a small gift in the first fitting conversation each day.
gmcm.giftChanceMax.name: 5-heart daily gift chance (max)
gmcm.giftChanceMax.tooltip: After an NPC reaches 5 hearts, the upper bound of the chance to naturally offer a small gift in the first fitting conversation each day.
gmcm.moneyGifts.name: Allow NPC money gifts
gmcm.moneyGifts.tooltip: Only when fairly close may an NPC occasionally give the player a little money.
gmcm.moneyCap.name: Max money per gift
gmcm.moneyCap.tooltip: The most gold an AI money gift gives the player at once.
gmcm.farmHelp.name: Allow NPC watering help
gmcm.farmHelp.tooltip: Only on the farm and when fairly close may an NPC water nearby planted-but-unwatered crops.
gmcm.waterTiles.name: Max tiles watered per action
gmcm.waterTiles.tooltip: How many nearby crop tiles one AI watering action affects at most.
gmcm.companionOutings.name: Allow companion outings
gmcm.companionOutings.tooltip: Allow an NPC to accept an invitation to wander somewhere, enjoy the view, or sit quietly for a while, temporarily stepping away from the day's schedule.
gmcm.outingStay.name: Minimum outing stay
gmcm.outingStay.tooltip: How many game minutes the NPC stays after arriving; default 120 minutes, i.e. two game hours.
gmcm.festival.name: Allow festival interactions
gmcm.festival.tooltip: Allow AI to trigger light special interactions during festivals or events.
gmcm.questAssist.name: Allow quest assistance
gmcm.questAssist.tooltip: Allow AI to lightly assist around the player's current quests, without completing them or changing their state.
gmcm.npcState.name: Enable NPC state
gmcm.npcState.tooltip: Track each NPC's light current state, such as mood, attentiveness, and response leaning.
gmcm.stateDecay.name: Daily state decay
gmcm.stateDecay.tooltip: How far NPC state falls back toward normal at the start of each day.
gmcm.emotionDecay.name: Daily emotion decay
gmcm.emotionDecay.tooltip: How far long-term interpersonal emotion falls back toward calm at the start of each day.
gmcm.conflictDecay.name: Daily conflict decay
gmcm.conflictDecay.tooltip: How far unresolved conflict severity naturally drops at the start of each day; apologies and fitting gifts speed recovery further.
gmcm.passive.name: Passive behaviors
gmcm.passive.tooltip: Allow nearby NPCs to react naturally now and then without pressing the hotkey.
gmcm.passiveChance.name: Passive trigger chance
gmcm.passiveChance.tooltip: The chance to trigger a passive behavior every 10 in-game minutes.
gmcm.maxBehaviors.name: Max behaviors per NPC per day
gmcm.maxBehaviors.tooltip: Limit how many times LivingNPCs can trigger a behavior for each NPC per day.
gmcm.interactionDistance.name: Interaction distance
gmcm.interactionDistance.tooltip: The maximum distance, in tiles, at which LivingNPCs can affect a nearby NPC.
gmcm.allowFace.name: Allow facing the player
gmcm.allowFace.tooltip: Allow NPCs to turn toward the player.
gmcm.allowEmote.name: Allow emotes
gmcm.allowEmote.tooltip: Allow NPCs to show emote bubbles.
gmcm.allowApproach.name: Allow walking over
gmcm.allowApproach.tooltip: Allow NPCs to pathfind a short distance to a safe tile beside the player.
gmcm.sve.name: Enable SVE compatibility
gmcm.sve.tooltip: When off, LivingNPCs no longer uses SVE-specific profiles, expansion progress, or expansion NPC context.
gmcm.rsv.name: Enable RSV compatibility
gmcm.rsv.tooltip: When off, LivingNPCs no longer uses Ridgeside Village-specific profiles, expansion progress, or expansion NPC context.
gmcm.bridge.name: Send behavior context to ValleyTalk
gmcm.bridge.tooltip: Let ValleyTalk's dialogue generation take an NPC's recent LivingNPCs behavior into account.
gmcm.concisePrompt.name: Concise prompt context
gmcm.concisePrompt.tooltip: Send ValleyTalk a slimmer hidden context: keeps mood, memory, relationship and situational cues (gifts/help/outings), but drops the repeated world-stage and reply-guidance text to save tokens. The AI's response format is unaffected. Off by default.
gmcm.aiPlanner.name: Enable AI behavior planner
gmcm.aiPlanner.tooltip: Optional. Use an OpenAI-compatible endpoint to choose NPC behavior intents.
gmcm.plannerEndpoint.name: Planner endpoint
gmcm.plannerModel.name: Planner model
gmcm.plannerModel.tooltip: The model name used to choose NPC behavior intents.
gmcm.plannerTimeout.name: Planner timeout
gmcm.plannerTimeout.tooltip: After the AI planner times out, it falls back to rule-based behavior. Unit: seconds.
gmcm.manualMode.approachPlayer: Test only: walk over to player
